summary: Full Stack Developer with 6+ years of experience designing and developing scalable web applications using JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, and NestJS. Strong background in frontend and backend development, databases, CI/CD, and cloud infrastructure (CloudStack, Ceph).

description.one: Worked on a cloud infrastructure platform built on OpenStack, contributing to analysis, design, and development of core features.
description.two: Participated in development of object storage services using Ceph / S3-compatible storage, integrating them into the platform.

description.five: Collaborated with team members to analyze requirements and deliver cloud-related features end-to-end.

description.one: Built the frontend of the Koja Tracking System, enabling efficient tracking and management workflows.

description.one: Maintained and enhanced the Karan job seeker platform, ensuring stability and smooth user experience.

description.three: Developed and improved frontend features using modern JavaScript and component-based architecture.
description.four: Introduced and integrated a utility-first CSS approach similar to Tailwind CSS, improving UI consistency and development speed.
